experience.description: Joined as the sole designer and took full ownership of the product experience. Shaping UI direction, design systems, and ongoing feature work
Responsible for the end-to-end product experience, bringing design consistency and structure to a product already in motion
Came in at the early stage and helped define the product's foundational structure — from initial flows to the core UI framework
